title: Phyllomphax truncatolabellata
taxonomy: Phyllomphax truncatolabellata is a plant species in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Phyllomphax, which is part of the order Caryophyllales. This plant is endemic to South Africa, where it grows in areas with well-drained soil. The classification of Phyllomphax truncatolabellata is based on its unique characteristics, such as its leaf morphology and growth habit. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species within the plant kingdom.
